## Meeting Purpose

[Content audit discussion and workflow improvement strategies for GrowthX's content creation process.](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [20-30% of current content feels good, with room for improvement in the rest](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Client-specific needs (e.g., AfterShoot's storytelling style) require tailored approaches](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Structural issues like skeletal content and hallucinations need addressing](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [New sprint groups and custom workflows for new clients will enhance onboarding and content quality](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)

## Topics

### Content Audit Overview

  - [20-30% of content feels good, substantial portion needs improvement](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [No reason to panic, but definite need for enhancement](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Exercise aimed to take temperature of current content output](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)

### Client-Specific Content Challenges (AfterShoot)

  - [Very hands-on with content, making frequent edits](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Prefer storytelling style, sometimes bordering on "corny"](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
  - [Slow feedback loop affecting content production speed](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [32,000 words written in a month, but publication process is slow](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)

### Structural Content Issues

  - [Skeletal structure with single sentences, H3s, and bullets needs addressing](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Aim for more narrative flow and fleshed-out sections](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Watch for repetitive patterns like "not the worst thing, it's the best thing"](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Consider converting tables to graphics for better visual appeal](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)

### Content Hallucination Risks

  - [Example: Hub and Spoke article contained irrelevant logistics information](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
  - [Need for careful review, especially with unique or new product cases](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Recommendation to refresh and republish affected content](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [New sprint group for new clients to ensure better calibration](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [Custom workflows and instructions for each client](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Matthew personally editing calibration content with directors and MEs](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [David's client-specific polishing instructions praised as a model for future use](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)

### Client Communication Strategies

  - [Suggest dedicated client call to discuss workflow and publishing speed](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Be upfront about balancing speed and quality, offering to revisit and improve content](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Emphasize the refresh process built into SoWs for continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)

## Next Steps

  - [David to write a note about the exercise that led to the client-specific instructions](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [Implement custom workflows and instructions for each client](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Address structural issues in content, focusing on narrative flow](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Refresh and republish the Hub and Spoke article to remove hallucinated content](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Continue personal editing of calibration content for new accounts](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Explore ways to speed up feedback and publication process with clients](https://fathom.video/share/smjnZL1o11DXcAfgxwsPPKsYUJPd3qMQ?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
